events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: **pass**, low risk. The pre-task photos show guards, access control, and crew protection staged as planned, with a signed daily briefing and no visible active exposure — no defects to flag. Immediate actions focus on maintaining those controls (barricades, de-energization verification, PPE re-check) as work progresses, rather than correcting an unsafe condition.
